heading: Notice of service
label: 4587 Notice of service
text: Any service required or authorized to be made by the Director under this subpart may be made by registered mail or in such other manner reasonably calculated to give actual notice, as the Director may by regulation or otherwise provide.
notes: Amendments2008— substituted “Director” for “Secretary” in two places in text.Pub. L. 110–289
amendments: Amendments2008— substituted “Director” for “Secretary” in two places in text.Pub. L. 110–289
